summary.intent: Add the `entire` tool to the project's `.tool-versions` file so it is managed by mise, using the latest available version.
summary.outcome: Latest version 0.5.5 was fetched from mise-versions.jdx.dev, added to `.tool-versions`, installed successfully via `mise i`, and committed with the message 'build: entire 0.5.5 を .tool-versions に追加'.

repo: Project uses mise for tool version management via `.tool-versions` in /Users/seiyakokushi/git/ronnnnn/cc/build-entire/
The repository's default base branch is `main`
Commit messages in this repo follow Japanese-language conventional commits (e.g., 'build: ...' prefix)

code.finding: Column widths are kept aligned across tool entries when adding new tools

workflow: mise version discovery uses https://mise-versions.jdx.dev/tools/<toolname> to find the latest release
The commit skill presents numbered message candidates ranked by recommendation and waits for user selection before committing
